name: HRA_ROLE_DEFNS_VL
query: SELECT RD.ROLE_ID, RD.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, RD.MODULE_ID, RD.ROLE_TYPE_CODE, RDTL.NAME, RDTL.DESCRIPTION, RD.DATE_FROM, RD.DATE_TO, RD.STATUS_CODE, RD.MATRIX_PARTICIPANT_FLAG, RD.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, RD.CREATED_BY, RD.CREATION_DATE, RD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, RD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, RD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, RD.MANAGER_TYPE FROM HRA_ROLE_DEFNS_B RD, HRA_ROLE_DEFNS_TL RDTL WHERE RD.ROLE_ID = RDTL.ROLE_ID AND RD.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = RDTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND RDTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
